positive: A stylized, minimalist vector illustration of a majestic celestial animal, combining elements of a dragon and a crescent moon, flying across a field of geometric, stylized nebula clouds. The design features clean, strong silhouettes and interlocking patterns, rendered in a vibrant palette of deep indigo, cosmic lavender, gold foil accents, and electric teal. Central composition, high contrast, perfect symmetry, vector art style, suitable for screen printing on dark fabric. Flat graphic design, detailed linework, sticker quality, centered.
